languages.text: "Вы жестоки, {name}. Жестоки, но правы — я был опрометчив и эгоистичен. Я не могу позволить себе поступить так снова. Лишь расчеты и подготовка помогут мне в этот раз".
"You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."
languages.original_text: "Вы жестоки, {name}. Жестоки, но правы — я был опрометчив и эгоистичен. Я не могу позволить себе поступить так снова. Лишь расчеты и подготовка помогут мне в этот раз".

traits.locale_text: "You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."
"You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."
"You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."

languages.text: «Es usted cruel, {name}. Pero tiene razón, he sido atolondrado y egoísta. No puedo volver a pensar así. Solo mediante cálculos y preparativos podré triunfar esta vez».
languages.original_text: "You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."

traits.locale_text: «Es usted cruel, {name}. Pero tiene razón, he sido atolondrado y egoísta. No puedo volver a pensar así. Solo mediante cálculos y preparativos podré triunfar esta vez».

languages.text: “您很残忍，大人。残忍，但正确——是我太鲁莽、太自私了。我不能再这样下去了。这一次，我只能依靠精密的计算和万全的准备。”
languages.original_text: "You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."

traits.locale_text: “您很残忍，大人。残忍，但正确——是我太鲁莽、太自私了。我不能再这样下去了。这一次，我只能依靠精密的计算和万全的准备。”

languages.text: « Vous êtes {mf|cruel|cruelle}, {name}. Mais vous avez raison, j'ai agi sans réfléchir en laissant mon égoïsme prendre le dessus. Je ne peux plus me le permettre. Cette fois, je dois effectuer tous les calculs et préparatifs nécessaires. »
languages.original_text: "You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes {mf|cruel|cruelle}, {name}. Mais vous avez raison, j'ai agi sans réfléchir en laissant mon égoïsme prendre le dessus. Je ne peux plus me le permettre. Cette fois, je dois effectuer tous les calculs et préparatifs nécessaires. »

languages.text: "Zalimsiniz. Haklısınız da. Aceleci ve bencil davrandım. Bir daha böyle davranmayı göze alamam. Bu sefer bana sadece hesaplama ve hazırlık yardım edebilir."
languages.original_text: "You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."

traits.locale_text: "Zalimsiniz. Haklısınız da. Aceleci ve bencil davrandım. Bir daha böyle davranmayı göze alamam. Bu sefer bana sadece hesaplama ve hazırlık yardım edebilir."

languages.text: "Ihr seid grausam, {name}. Grausam, aber korrekt ... ich war kopflos und egozentrisch. Ich kann es mir nicht leisten, mich erneut so zu verhalten. In diesem Fall werden mir nur Berechnungen und eine gute Vorbereitung helfen."
languages.original_text: "You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid grausam, {name}. Grausam, aber korrekt ... ich war kopflos und egozentrisch. Ich kann es mir nicht leisten, mich erneut so zu verhalten. In diesem Fall werden mir nur Berechnungen und eine gute Vorbereitung helfen."

languages.text: 「あなたは残酷だ、{name} 。私は軽率で、自己中心的だった。もう二度とあのような振る舞いはできない。今回は計算と準備だけが私を助けてくれるだろう」
languages.original_text: "You are cruel, {name}. Cruel, but correct — I was rash and self-absorbed. I cannot afford to behave that way again. Only calculation and preparation will help me this time."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは残酷だ、{name} 。私は軽率で、自己中心的だった。もう二度とあのような振る舞いはできない。今回は計算と準備だけが私を助けてくれるだろう」
